summary: Comprehensive testing of Speakking AI Voice Translation Coach app completed. Backend API testing achieved 89.3% success rate (25/28 tests). Frontend testing achieved 100% success rate with all user flows working correctly. AI integration with Emergent LLM is functional.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - correct behavior, just different HTTP status code

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility
